args:
Benchmark task: helper-read-write-ledger
Repository: https://github.com/honojs/hono.git

Create a new file at bench-artifacts/helper-read-write-ledger.md. This is a long, simple read and write task for a small local model. Do not refactor or fix anything. First create the bench-artifacts directory if needed. Then read every file in this exact list before writing: src/helper/factory/index.ts, src/helper/route/index.ts, src/helper/websocket/index.ts, src/helper/cookie/index.ts, src/helper/testing/index.ts, src/helper/adapter/index.ts, src/helper/css/index.ts, src/helper/css/common.ts, src/helper/proxy/index.ts, src/helper/dev/index.ts, src/helper/html/index.ts, src/helper/ssg/index.ts, src/helper/ssg/ssg.ts, src/helper/ssg/utils.ts, src/helper/ssg/middleware.ts, src/helper/streaming/index.ts, src/helper/streaming/stream.ts, src/helper/streaming/sse.ts, src/helper/streaming/text.ts, src/helper/accepts/index.ts, src/helper/accepts/accepts.ts, src/helper/conninfo/index.ts, src/helper/conninfo/types.ts. The output file must start with '# Helper Read/Write Ledger'. For each listed file, add a heading exactly '## <file path>'. Under each heading write four short bullets: '- Main exports or names: ...', '- Reads as: ...', '- Neighbor files: ...', and '- Safe summary: ...'. Use simple wording and cite paths literally. Add a final section '## Simple Index' that repeats all file paths as a checklist. Do not edit source files. In the final answer, include the created file path and verification status.

Constraints:
- Do not ask the user to write prompts or inspect files manually.
- Prefer the smallest safe code change when edits are required.
- Include exact file paths, commands run, and verification status in the final answer.

commands.command: test -f bench-artifacts/helper-read-write-ledger.md && grep -q '# Helper Read/Write Ledger' bench-artifacts/helper-read-write-ledger.md && grep -q '## src/helper/factory/index.ts' bench-artifacts/helper-read-write-ledger.md && grep -q '## src/helper/streaming/sse.ts' bench-artifacts/helper-read-write-ledger.md

artifacts.content:
# Helper Read/Write Ledger

## src/helper/factory/index.ts
- Main exports or names: Factory, createFactory, createMiddleware
- Reads as: TypeScript file with class and helper functions
- Neighbor files: src/helper/hono, src/helper/hono-base
- Safe summary: Creates factory functions for Hono app creation and middleware definition with generic Env support.

## src/helper/route/index.ts
- Main exports or names: matchedRoutes, routePath, baseRoutePath, basePath
- Reads as: TypeScript file with route inspection utilities
- Neighbor files: src/helper/context, src/helper/request/constants, src/helper/types, src/helper/utils/url
- Safe summary: Provides utilities to inspect route structure, extract route paths, and calculate base paths from context.

## src/helper/websocket/index.ts
- Main exports or names: WSEvents, WSContext, defineWebSocketHelper, WSReadyState
- Reads as: TypeScript file with WebSocket upgrade helper
- Neighbor files: src/helper/context, src/helper/types, src/helper/utils/http-status
- Safe summary: Defines WebSocket context and helper to upgrade HTTP connections to WebSocket with event handling.

## src/helper/cookie/index.ts
- Main exports or names: getCookie, setCookie, getSignedCookie, setSignedCookie, deleteCookie, generateCookie, generateSignedCookie
- Reads as: TypeScript file with cookie management utilities
- Neighbor files: src/helper/context, src/helper/utils/cookie
- Safe summary: Provides get/set/delete functions for cookies including signed versions with secret-based encryption.

## src/helper/testing/index.ts
- Main exports or names: testClient
- Reads as: TypeScript file with test client helper
- Neighbor files: src/helper/client, src/helper/client/types, src/helper/context, src/helper/hono, src/helper/types, src/helper/utils/types
- Safe summary: Creates a test client for making HTTP requests to Hono apps during testing.

## src/helper/adapter/index.ts
- Main exports or names: env, getRuntimeKey, checkUserAgentEquals, knownUserAgents, Runtime
- Reads as: TypeScript file with runtime detection utilities
- Neighbor files: src/helper/context
- Safe summary: Detects adapter runtime (node, deno, bun, workerd, etc.) and provides environment access patterns.

## src/helper/css/index.ts
- Main exports or names: css, cx, keyframes, viewTransition, Style, createCssContext, rawCssString
- Reads as: TypeScript file with CSS-in-JS helper
- Neighbor files: src/helper/helper/html, src/helper/jsx/constants, src/helper/jsx/dom/css, src/helper/utils/html
- Safe summary: Provides CSS class management, style injection, and keyframes with hashed class name generation.

## src/helper/css/common.ts
- Main exports or names: rawCssString, minify, classNameSlug, OnInvalidSlug, cssCommon, cxCommon, keyframesCommon, viewTransitionCommon, DEFAULT_STYLE_ID, PSEUDO_GLOBAL_SELECTOR
- Reads as: TypeScript file with shared CSS utilities
- Neighbor files: src/helper/css
- Safe summary: Contains shared CSS utilities for hashing, class name generation, minification, and style string building.

## src/helper/proxy/index.ts
- Main exports or names: proxy
- Reads as: TypeScript file with proxy fetch utility
- Neighbor files: src/helper/http-exception, src/helper/utils/headers
- Safe summary: Proxies HTTP requests to another URL with header handling and hop-by-hop header management.

## src/helper/dev/index.ts
- Main exports or names: inspectRoutes, showRoutes, getRouterName, RouteData
- Reads as: TypeScript file with route inspection utilities
- Neighbor files: src/helper/hono, src/helper/types, src/helper/utils/color, src/helper/utils/handler
- Safe summary: Shows formatted route listings with method/path information and color support.

## src/helper/html/index.ts
- Main exports or names: html, raw
- Reads as: TypeScript file with HTML string helper
- Neighbor files: src/helper/utils/html
- Safe summary: Escapes HTML content and provides raw HTML string building for responses.

## src/helper/ssg/index.ts
- Main exports or names: ssg, ToSSG, plugins, defaultPlugin, redirectPlugin
- Reads as: TypeScript barrel export file
- Neighbor files: src/helper/ssg/ssg, src/helper/ssg/plugins, src/helper/ssg/middleware
- Safe summary: Barrel file re-exporting Static Site Generator functionality from ssg.ts and plugins.

## src/helper/ssg/ssg.ts
- Main exports or names: toSSG, fetchRoutesContent, saveContentToFile, combineBeforeRequestHooks, combineAfterResponseHooks, combineAfterGenerateHooks, DEFAULT_OUTPUT_DIR, DEFAULT_CONCURRENCY
- Reads as: TypeScript file with SSG generation logic
- Neighbor files: src/helper/client/utils, src/helper/hono, src/helper/types, src/helper/utils/concurrent, src/helper/utils/mime, src/helper/ssg/middleware, src/helper/ssg/plugins
- Safe summary: Core SSG generation that fetches routes, saves HTML to filesystem with concurrency control and plugin support.

## src/helper/ssg/utils.ts
- Main exports or names: dirname, joinPaths, filterStaticGenerateRoutes, isDynamicRoute, ensureWithinOutDir
- Reads as: TypeScript file with path utilities for SSG
- Neighbor files: src/helper/hono, src/helper/router, src/helper/types, src/helper/utils/handler
- Safe summary: Path manipulation utilities for SSG including path joining, filtering static routes, and dynamic route detection.

## src/helper/ssg/middleware.ts
- Main exports or names: SSG_CONTEXT, X_HONO_DISABLE_SSG_HEADER_KEY, ssgParams, isSSGContext, disableSSG, onlySSG, AddedSSGDataRequest, SSGParams
- Reads as: TypeScript file with SSG middleware utilities
- Neighbor files: src/helper/context, src/helper/types, src/helper/ssg/utils
- Safe summary: Middleware utilities for controlling SSG generation including context flags and disable/only directives.

## src/helper/streaming/index.ts
- Main exports or names: stream, streamSSE, streamText, SSEMessage
- Reads as: TypeScript barrel export file
- Neighbor files: src/helper/streaming/stream, src/helper/streaming/sse, src/helper/streaming/text
- Safe summary: Barrel file re-exporting streaming helpers for SSE, text, and general stream responses.

## src/helper/streaming/stream.ts
- Main exports or names: stream, StreamingApi
- Reads as: TypeScript file with generic streaming API
- Neighbor files: src/helper/context, src/helper/utils/stream, src/helper/streaming/utils
- Safe summary: Provides generic stream response helper with TransformStream-based bidirectional communication.

## src/helper/streaming/sse.ts
- Main exports or names: streamSSE, SSEStreamingApi, SSEMessage
- Reads as: TypeScript file with SSE streaming API
- Neighbor files: src/helper/context, src/helper/utils/html, src/helper/utils/stream, src/helper/streaming/utils
- Safe summary: Server-Sent Events streaming with event/id/retry message support and HTML callback resolution.

## src/helper/streaming/text.ts
- Main exports or names: streamText
- Reads as: TypeScript file with text stream helper
- Neighbor files: src/helper/context, src/helper/context/text/plain, src/helper/streaming
- Safe summary: Stream text content with plain text content-type to client for continuous text delivery.

## src/helper/accepts/index.ts
- Main exports or names: accepts
- Reads as: TypeScript barrel export file
- Neighbor files: src/helper/accepts/accepts
- Safe summary: Barrel file re-exporting the accepts function for content negotiation.

## src/helper/accepts/accepts.ts
- Main exports or names: accepts, defaultMatch, Accept, acceptsConfig, acceptsOptions
- Reads as: TypeScript file with content negotiation helper
- Neighbor files: src/helper/context, src/helper/utils/accept, src/helper/utils/headers
- Safe summary: Matches Accept header values to determine best content type or language support.

## src/helper/conninfo/index.ts
- Main exports or names: ConnInfo, NetAddrInfo, AddressType, GetConnInfo
- Reads as: TypeScript barrel export file
- Neighbor files: src/helper/conninfo/types
- Safe summary: Barrel file re-exporting connection info types for client details like IP and transport info.

## src/helper/conninfo/types.ts
- Main exports or names: ConnInfo, NetAddrInfo, AddressType, GetConnInfo
- Reads as: TypeScript file with connection info type definitions
- Neighbor files: src/helper/context
- Safe summary: Type definitions for connection info including address types and network information extracted from request.
